nasb.text: Your children, however, whom you said would become a prey—I will bring them in, and they will know the land which you have rejected.

esv.text: But your little ones, who you said would become a prey, I will bring in, and they shall know the land that you have rejected.

cnv.text: 但是你們的孩子，就是你們所說他們必被擄掠的，我要把他們領進去，他們必得著你們厭棄的那地。

ccb.text: 你们说你们的儿女会被掳去，但我要把他们带到那里，让他们享有那片你们厌弃的土地。
